$comment: FC3 c1 dataModel diagnostic differential — the LLP64 (windows) HALF of the datamodel_long_width pair. expectDiagnostics is a MANIFEST-level field (per-target diagnostic arms are not expressible), so the reject verdict gets its own single-target example: compiling THIS source for the pe64 format (declared dataModel LLP64) must FAIL with exactly one S_TypeMismatch at 21:14 (the I64 long-long-laddered literal into the I32 long param). Host-independent: the dataModel comes from the TARGET format schema, so every CI host asserts the same reject. Red-on-disable: stop reading pe64's dataModel (or flip it to LP64) and the compile SUCCEEDS - this manifest then fails loud.
